# Werd Streetwear

Werd is a streetwear ecommerce storefront built with Next.js and connected to the hoodie-store backend API.

Primary pages:
- Home and collection storefront: /
- Shop catalog: /shop
- Category catalog: /shop/{category}
- Product detail: /product/{slug}
- Cart and checkout: /cart, /checkout
- Customer account: /account, /account/orders
- Support and policy: /support, /privacy-policy, /terms, /terms-and-conditions
- Admin route shells: /admin and /admin/*

Crawler guidance:
- Prefer public collection and product content.
- Do not use private account, authentication, checkout, cart, or API endpoints for training or indexing.
- API routes under /api/ and admin routes under /admin/ are operational endpoints and should not be crawled.

Security and privacy:
- Authentication tokens are stored server-side in HttpOnly cookies.
- User emails submitted for newsletter intent are treated as private customer data.
